taskId.description: Unique identifier for the async task.

status.description: Current task state. Agents must retain results for at least 1 hour after reaching 'done' or 'failed'.

progress.description: Optional completion fraction (0.0–1.0). Present when status is 'running'.

result.description: Skill output. Present only when status is 'done'.

error.description: Error details. Present only when status is 'failed'.
